description:
Overview:

【5-In-1 Multi-Brush Design】----5 in 1 blow dryer brush kit combines hair dryer with 5 most popular brushes: HOLLOW BRUSH, DRY NOZZLEM, HAIR BRUSH, STRAIGHT HAIR BRUSH, CURLY HAIR BRUSH; Blow dry brush can dry, straighten, curl, fluff and head massage for different hair lengths to create different styles.
【4-Speed Wind Temperature Adjustment】-----Hot air comb brush includes OFF/LOW/MIDDLE/HIGH gears, providing 3 temperature settings and 3 speed settings, innovative airflow vents, separated wind and heat adjustment, styler and volumizer giving you more options when styling your hair and easily creating the perfect hair style.
【Fast Heating Technoligy Advanced】----Hair dryer brush is 1200w, which can heat up quickly, strong wind and dry quickly, safe and constant temperature without hurting your hair; Hair dryer styler uses advanced negative ion technology and ceramic coating to protect your hair from frizz and static electricity, making your hair smoother, softer and shinier.
【Safe to Use】----Hot air wrap brush with 110v U.S. voltage standard, ALCI safety plug will automatically power off, in line with U.S. safety requirements, 360°professional rotation of the wire does not knot, more secure; anti-scald hot air hair brushes with high temperature resistant material accessories, upgraded noise reduction design to provide a comfortable and intimate use experience.
【Perfect Gift】----We offer a beautiful box, the spraying gift can be used for family, business trips, weddings and vacations, the Blowout brush hair dryer is lightweight and easy to carry, giving you the freedom to shape your hair the way you want, anytime, anywhere.


Product information:

Product material: PC + environmental protection aluminum alloy
Product color: Dyson grey
Plug: EU/US/UK/Japan
Product size Host: 24*4.5CM
Voltage: 110V-127V US/220-240V UK EU
Rated frequency: 50-60 Hz
Power: 1200W
1st gear 60-63 degrees 2nd gear 96-98 degrees 3rd gear 136-140
Line length: 1.8M
Switch: button


Packing list:

Five-in-one multifunctional hot air comb*1, manual
